titleStmt.title: SII 23.620: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 620. (A.R. No. 620 of 1907.) Guṇḍlūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Agastyēśvara temple—on another slab set up in the same place Tribh. Rājarāja (III). Year 21: 1236-7 A.D.

summary.p: The cyclic year Durmukhi corresponding to the 21st regnal year of the king makes the inscription one of Rājarāja III. The record states that a certain Īśāṉadēvar, an āṇḍār looking after the flower garden of Tiruvagattīśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Guṇḍalūr in Pottappi-nāḍu which was a subdivision of Mēṟpākkai-nāḍu, died by taking the alari plant poison probably under suspicious circumstances. On an order received from Kuṉṟapiḷḷaiyār Gaṇḍagōpālaṉ, the Nāṭṭavar and the officers with the Māhēśvaras of the temple made enquiries into the matter and punished the culprits responsible for the mishap. The maṉṟāḍuvār (assembly) of Guṇḍalūr undertook to burn a perpetual lamp in the temple for the merit of the deceased and the sons of the latter were to pay a third of the expense.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiribhuvaṉaccakkarava
tti Irājarājadevaṟku
yāṇṭu 2 10 1vatu dunmuki saṅ
vaccarattu mārkaḻi mācattu
Atirājentira maṇṭalat
tu meṟpākkai nāṭṭu
pottappi nāṭṭu kuṇṭa
lūril tiruvakattiśvaramu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār nan
tavāṉattu Āṇṭār Īcā
ṉatevar Alari tiṉṟu cākai
yāl Ivar Alari tiṉṟu kāriya
m Ārāyak kuṉṟappiḷḷai
yār kaṇṭakopālaṉ tirumuka
m nāṭṭavarkku Atikārikaḷukku ti
rumukamum peraṭaikaḷum vantu mā
kecurarum kūṭa Iruntu Ārāy
ntu kuṟṟamuṭaiyārai deṇ
ṭittu Ivāṇṭār ceyta tiru
nantavaṉamum ceṟu tirunanta
vānam ceytu Āṇṭārkkum
Ināyanār tiruvakatticuramu
ṭeyārkku tirunantāviḷa
kkukku Ikkuṇṭalū
r maṉṟāṭuvārkaḷom
Ittaṉmañ cantirātitarva
rai cellak kaṭavatāka
tānapraram paṇṇikku
ṭuttom Ivvāṇṭār
makkaḷe ceytu tevark
ku paṇṭārattukku muṉṟa
ttonṟu praram Iṭak
kaṭavaṉa .
Digital edition of SII 23.620 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
